title: lithocarpus chiungchungensis
intro: Lithocarpus chiungchungensis, also known as the Chinese stone oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, native to Taiwan. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Lithocarpus chiungchungensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
